## EncodeOptions.enableJsBytecode property

Whether to compile main thread chunks to JsBytecode in the emitted bundle.

**Signature:**

```typescript
enableJsBytecode?: boolean;
```

## Default Value

`false` when `NODE_ENV` is `'development'`<!-- -->, otherwise `true`

## Remarks

When disabled, main thread chunks are encoded as plain JavaScript source, which keeps them readable for debugging and speeds up encoding.

Only takes effect for the `'tasm'` target. For the `'web'` target the `JsBytecode` tag only routes main thread chunks to the correct bundle slot (the chunk is never bytecode-compiled), so it is always kept.
